phrases.intent_en: Ask where Piazza del Duomo is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova Piazza del Duomo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah PYAHT-tsah del DWOH-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: Catania's Piazza del Duomo features the Fontana dell'Elefante, the city's symbol, made of lava stone.

responses.english: Straight down this road, five minutes.
responses.phonetic: DREET-toh per KWES-tah STRAH-dah, CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Dritto per questa strada, cinque minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish market is
phrases.cultural_note: La Pescheria di Catania is one of Sicily's most vivid markets, held every morning near Piazza del Duomo.

responses.english: Behind the cathedral, go down the steps.
responses.phonetic: DYEH-troh eel DWOH-moh, SHEN-dah leh SKAH-leh.
responses.local: Dietro il Duomo, scenda le scale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to try street food
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove posso trovare lo street food tipico?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh POS-soh troh-VAH-reh loh street food TEE-pee-koh?
phrases.cultural_note: Catania is famous for arancini, granita, and horse meat sandwiches sold at the market.

responses.english: At the fish market, at the stalls nearby.
responses.phonetic: AL-lah pes-keh-REE-ah, nay KYOS-kee lee vee-CHEE-noh.
responses.local: Alla pescheria, nei chioschi lì vicino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the train station
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si arriva alla stazione?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh?

responses.english: By bus from Piazza del Duomo, line two.
responses.phonetic: een ow-toh-BOOS DAL-lah PYAHT-tsah del DWOH-moh, LEE-neh-ah DOO-eh.
responses.local: In autobus dalla Piazza del Duomo, linea due.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Baroque churches are open to visitors
phrases.text_local: Scusi, le chiese barocche sono aperte ai visitatori?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, leh KYEH-zeh bah-ROK-keh SOH-noh ah-PER-teh ay vee-zee-tah-TOH-ree?
phrases.cultural_note: Catania's Baroque churches, rebuilt after the 1693 earthquake, are among Sicily's finest.

responses.english: Yes, in the morning until one o'clock.
responses.phonetic: see, lah mat-TEE-nah FEE-noh AL-leh treh-DEE-chee.
responses.local: Sì, la mattina fino alle tredici.
